reason: Two P0 issues on a children-safety product (anon RLS bypass on push_idempotency + push_sent enabling emergency-push suppression) plus 18 P1 issues including unauthenticated Edge Functions, role escalation, location validation gaps, allowBackup JWT exposure, and unverified two-device pairing/calendar/memo/location/push runtime flows.
head: d5d183fa9d2cad168e8d8dcbc1139cede874217b

agent_status_summary.01_repo_build_static: FAIL — ALLOW_WITH_CAVEATS (self) — 2 P1 (Android lint NewApi/RECEIVER_EXPORTED, Playwright 24/60 fail), 2 P2, 2 P3
agent_status_summary.02_supabase_db_rls_realtime: FAIL — BLOCK (self) — 2 P0 (push_idempotency + push_sent anon RLS bypass), 2 P1 (subscription-reconcile/ai-voice-parse no auth), 4 P2
agent_status_summary.03_auth_family_isolation: PARTIAL_VERIFIED — ALLOW (self) — 0 P0, 2 P1 (child role-escalation via fm_upd, pair-code per-user rate limit), 2 P2; runtime pairing NOT_VERIFIED
agent_status_summary.04_calendar_memo_flow: PARTIAL_VERIFIED — ALLOW (self) — 0 P0, 2 P1 (push body month off-by-one, non-atomic saveEventWithChildren), 3 P2, 1 P3; runtime NOT_VERIFIED
agent_status_summary.05_location_geolocation: PARTIAL_VERIFIED — ALLOW (self) — 0 P0, 5 P1 (Kakao REST key bundled, unpair_child misses location_history, upsert_child_location no lat/lng range, record_location_history_rows anon+no validation, allowBackup), 1 P2, 4 P3; runtime NOT_VERIFIED
agent_status_summary.06_push_safety_force_ring: FAIL — BLOCK (self) — carries 1 P0 + 1 P1 (get_pending_notifications anon-callable no internal auth check), 5 P2; runtime NOT_VERIFIED
agent_status_summary.07_android_two_device: PARTIAL_VERIFIED — BLOCK (self) — install + cold-launch + mode-select + auth-screen + pair-input PASS on both devices; pairing/calendar/memo/location/push NOT_VERIFIED (OAuth requires manual)
agent_status_summary.08_web_e2e_real_services: FAIL — ALLOW_WITH_CAVEATS (self) — mocked 24/60 fail (stale selectors after d5d183f + a4b5795), real-services 43/43 PASS, 3 P1 (test drift), 2 P3
agent_status_summary.09_ui_soft_brand: PASS — ALLOW (self) — 0 P0/P1, 3 P2 (strong red selectable as child accent, 320x568 role-card wrap, splash contrast 2.54), 2 P3
agent_status_summary.10_security_privacy_policy: PASS — ALLOW (self) — 0 P0, 3 P1 (allowBackup JWT, feedback-email unauth, ai-voice-parse unauth), 4 P2, 2 P3
agent_status_summary.11_performance_reliability: PARTIAL_VERIFIED — BLOCK (self) — 4 P1 (realtime missed-event recovery, fetchEvents unbounded, no offline detection/queue, memo_replies polling gap), 7 P2, 3 P3

blocking_issues.title: push_idempotency anon-readable and anon-writable in production (RLS never enabled)
push_sent anon-readable and anon-writable in production (RLS drift; migration declares but prod state lost it)
Android lint: 2 errors in ForceRingActivity.java (NewApi L64, RECEIVER_EXPORTED L159)
Playwright critical-flows.spec.js: 24/60 fail (UI-vs-test selector drift from commits a4b5795 + d5d183f)
subscription-reconcile Edge Function lacks JWT verification (denial-of-wallet on Qonversion + DB writes)
ai-voice-parse Edge Function accepts unauthenticated callers (OpenAI gpt-4o cost abuse)
feedback-email Edge Function unauthenticated + leaks operator inbox address
Child can self-mutate family_members.role to 'parent' via PATCH (escalates to subscriptions/force_ring/storage/daily_supplies write)
Pair-code per-user rate limit defeated by unlimited anonymous signups (no captcha, no IP limit)
Push body for edit_event renders 0-indexed month (May shows as '2026/4/13')
saveEventWithChildren is 3 sequential REST calls without transaction — partial failure desyncs events_children (event becomes invisible to every child)
Kakao REST key (backend mobility/affiliate) embedded literally in dist/ and cached in SharedPreferences — domain/package restriction unverifiable
unpair_child RPC does not purge location_history (former child's coords persist after unpair)
upsert_child_location RPC accepts out-of-range lat/lng (no CHECK constraint, no server validation)
record_location_history_rows GRANTed to anon with no lat/lng range validation
android:allowBackup=true exposes user JWT + last coords + supabaseKey + fcmToken via adb backup (plaintext SharedPreferences)
get_pending_notifications RPC anon-callable with no internal auth check — anon can read any family's pending pushes (titles, bodies, requesterUserId)
Realtime CHANNEL_ERROR -> SUBSCRIBED reconnect does not trigger missed-event re-fetch (6 of 9 tables have no polling fallback)
fetchEvents has no .range() / date filter — unbounded JSON payload grows with family age
No offline detection, no mutation queue — failed insert rolls back and asks user to retry manually (commute/subway scenario)

non_blocking_issues.title: Main JS bundle 1.22 MB (374 KB gzip) — exceeds Vite 500 KB warning
Android lint: 54 warnings (BatteryLife, UnusedAttribute, InlinedApi)
Realtime publication coverage for location_history/remote_listen_sessions/sos_events NOT_VERIFIED
QONVERSION_ALLOW_UNSIGNED_WEBHOOKS env override exists (silently disables signature check)
Four post-Phase-1 migrations missing paired down files (operational debt)
CORS Allow-Origin: * on unauthenticated Edge Functions
mark_memo_read RPC executable by anon (returns 204; underlying RLS blocks state change but unnecessary surface)
getMyFamily exposes pair_code to every family member including children
30s polling fallback omits memo_replies (memo page closed + realtime drop = stale)
events_children INSERT policy lacks family-scope check on child_id (defense-in-depth)
GRANT ALL ON daily_supplies TO anon (RLS blocks but inconsistent grant)
Self-user INSERT skip drops memos for multi-device same-user scenarios
ShutdownReceiver posts to non-existent /rest/v1/locations table
push-notify has no global rate limit (instant push spam in-family)
push-notify has no body-size cap on title/message (oversized payload fails send)
push-notify returns raw error strings on 500 paths (schema hints)
remote_listen_sessions ended_at/duration_ms client-side only (crash leaves audit row open)
kkuk_check_cooldown depends on sos_events insert success (cooldown bypass on retry)
Strong red (#EF4444) is selectable as child theme accent — collides with SOS/긴급/하트 affordance
320x568 role-select CTA title wraps mid-word ('부모로 시 / 작')
Splash emphasis '시작' fails WCAG AA large-text contrast (2.54 < 3.0)
Release builds minifyEnabled=false (Java source ships in clear; ProGuard not applied)
No Sentry / equivalent — production crashes invisible
Error boundary leaks full stack trace to end users

not_verified_items: Two-device pairing flow runtime (Agent 07 step 6+): parent OAuth -> family create -> pair code -> child enter -> paired home
Child location origin + parent observation (Agent 05 runtime)
Push/safety end-to-end on real devices: SOS, force_ring, kkuk, instant push (Agent 06 runtime)
Remote listen persistent FGS notification visible on child device (Agent 06 runtime)
Force ring full-screen intent over lockscreen behavior on real device (Agent 06 runtime)
Kakao console domain/package restriction for bundled REST_KEY + APP_KEY (Agent 05 + Agent 10 VULN-006)

deferred_items.label: two-device-pairing-runtime
deferred_items.reason: OAuth handoff requires manual tester credentials; production-touching automation forbidden. Re-dispatch follow-up agent once tester completes pairing.

deferred_items.label: force-ring-real-device-lockscreen
deferred_items.reason: Blocked on pairing + needs lockscreen capture

deferred_items.label: remote-listen-persistent-notification
deferred_items.reason: Blocked on pairing + premium entitlement seed

required_fixes_before_release.fix: ALTER TABLE public.push_idempotency ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY service_only ON public.push_idempotency USING (false) WITH CHECK (false); REVOKE ALL ON public.push_idempotency FROM anon, authenticated; (table is service-role-only)
Re-apply RLS to push_sent in production; assert via anon probe before deploy. Add CI guard that fails if any RLS-required table is unprotected in prod.
Wrap KeyguardManager#requestDismissKeyguard in Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= O guard (or @TargetApi(26)); add ContextCompat.registerReceiver(..., RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED) for the stopReceiver.

Update tests to use getByRole('heading',{name:'긴급 알림'}) and drop getByText('학부모 모드') assertion (chip is now display:none in compact header by design). 24 critical-flow tests share the same selector pattern.
Add getClaims() verify-jwt gate at function entry; require service_role for cron-style invocations. Alternative: enable verify_jwt in supabase/functions/subscription-reconcile/deno.json.
Add getClaims() JWT check; add per-family rate limit (e.g. 30/hr); restrict CORS to production domain.
Add getClaims() JWT check + per-user rate limit; remove hardcoded operator-email fallback; restrict CORS.

Add BEFORE UPDATE trigger on family_members raising on role change; OR rewrite fm_upd WITH CHECK to (role = (SELECT role FROM family_members fm0 WHERE fm0.id = family_members.id)); add CHECK constraint role IN ('parent','child').
Add IP-based rate limit via Edge Function wrapper around join_family; bump pair code to 12 chars (48 bits) OR require captcha on signInAnonymously.
src/App.jsx:4089 — split messageDateKey by '-', render as ${y}/${m+1}/${d} or '${m+1}월 ${d}일'. Audit any other path consuming raw dateKey for display.
Wrap events upsert + events_children delete + insert in a SECURITY DEFINER RPC (single transaction). Fallback: set is_family_event=true when childIds.length===0 to avoid invisible-event failure mode.
Move Kakao REST key server-side (Edge Function proxy). Verify Kakao console domain/package restriction. Strip the cached copy from LocationService SharedPreferences.
Extend unpair_child to DELETE FROM location_history WHERE user_id = p_child_user_id AND family_id = (...).
Add CHECK (lat BETWEEN -90 AND 90 AND lng BETWEEN -180 AND 180) to child_locations table; assert in upsert_child_location SQL.
REVOKE EXECUTE ON FUNCTION record_location_history_rows FROM anon; add lat/lng range assertion in function body.
Set android:allowBackup=false in AndroidManifest.xml; OR migrate SharedPreferences to EncryptedSharedPreferences + add res/xml/backup_rules.xml excluding hyeni_location_prefs.

Wrap function body with: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_members WHERE family_id = p_family_id AND user_id = auth.uid()) THEN RETURN; END IF; OR REVOKE EXECUTE FROM anon and rely on FCM polling only.

On Realtime subscribe success after CHANNEL_ERROR, trigger fetchEvents/fetchMemos/fetchMemoReplies for current dateKey window. Add the missing 6 tables (memo_replies, academies, daily_supplies, child_locations, family_members, family_subscription) to the 30s polling loop.
Add date filter (start_date >= now()-90d AND start_date < now()+180d) and .range(0, 499) to fetchEvents.
Add @capacitor/network listener (web: navigator.onLine fallback). Queue failed mutations in IndexedDB and replay on reconnect.
